quick_skim.title: A Multi-Branch Hierarchy-Aware Framework for Heterogeneous Audio Classification
quick_skim.abstract: This technical report describes our system for Task 1 of the DCASE 2026 Challenge, which aims to classify heterogeneous audio recordings according to the Broad Sound Taxonomy (BST). The task requires both accurate second-level prediction and consistency with the top-level taxonomy. Our system is built on CLAP-based audio-text representations and is improved along three strategies: expanding the training set with a filtered subset of BSD35k, enhancing acoustic modeling with feature-specific branches, and refining predictions using hierarchy-aware classifiers and KNN-based post-processing. Among the acoustic features considered, the log-STFT branch provides the strongest single-model performance. With KNN-based post-processing, our best single system achieves a hierarchical F1 score (Hier. F1) of 80.84% on the BSD10k-v1.2 set under the same evaluation protocol as the baseline. We further construct ensemble systems by combining models with complementary acoustic features and classification heads, achieving Hier. F1 scores of 81.25% and 81.18%, respectively.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Heterogeneous audio classification framework using log-STFT features, applicable to ship noise high-frequency feature extraction
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用log-STFT特征的异构音频分类框架，可用于船噪声高频特征提取
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用log-STFT特征的异构音频分类框架，可用于船噪声高频特征提取
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用log-STFT特征的异构音频分类框架，可用于船噪声高频特征提取
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes multi-branch hierarchy-aware audio classification system for DCASE 2026 Task 1, using CLAP features and log-STFT branches, achieving strong performance; methods transferable to ship noise recognition.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出一种多分支层次感知框架用于DCASE 2026挑战赛的异构音频分类任务。系统基于CLAP音频文本表示，引入log-STFT等声学特征分支，结合层次感知分类器和KNN后处理，在Broad Sound Taxonomy上取得优异成绩。其中log-STFT分支能有效捕获高频信息，该框架可直接应用于船噪声的高频成分分析与识别任务。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文提出一种多分支层次感知框架用于DCASE 2026挑战赛的异构音频分类任务。系统基于CLAP音频文本表示，引入log-STFT等声学特征分支，结合层次感知分类器和KNN后处理，在Broad Sound Taxonomy上取得优异成绩。其中log-STFT分支能有效捕获高频信息，该框架可直接应用于船噪声的高频成分分析与识别任务。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 在水声信号如船舰噪声中利用高频信息做识别的文章, especially work that connects or combines: high frequency components in ship noise for recognition; underwater acoustic target recognition using high frequency features; vessel noise classification with high frequency cues; high frequency acoustic features for ship noise recognition; ship radiated noise high frequency recognition; underwater acoustic signal processing for high frequency target recognition; high frequency ship noise recognition methods; using high frequency acoustic features for underwater target classification; ship radiated noise high frequency components for identification.
